name: Precedence Less And Greater With Logical And
description: a < b & c > d — AND (9) > COMPARISON (4) so '&' binds tighter than '<' or '>'. Trace: 'a < b' starts; inside right-of-<, 'b' consumed then '& c' attaches (AND ≥ COMPARISON+1). 'b & c' returned. Then '< returns Less(a, And(b,c)). Outer COMPARISON loop attaches '> d' (left-assoc). Result Greater(Less(a, And(b,c)), d).
